chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.S- 500 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 13.11.2025. Mr. Khan Muhammad Lashari, Advocate for applicant. Ms. Safa Hisbani, A.P.G for State. = This matter was part-heard yesterday on 12.11.2025 and fixed by me today for further arguments including the submission of any case law in support of the application. The applicant / plaintiff Abdul Rasool had filed the Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.912/2024 before the 1st Additional Sessions Judge / Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Badin wherein he had sought directions for filing of an FIR however, the learned Ex-Officio Justice of Peace came to the conclusion that there was no information available to trigger for recording applicant’s statement by the police officials and / or any further proceedings. Heard counsel. I have considered the information available on record. There’s the provisional medical report relied by the applicant which in the first instance is provisional and not final. Further the injury said to have sustained by the injured is minor in nature and does not constitute information which may lead to a cognizable offence. Notwithstanding the foregoing the background of this dispute also appears to be of civil nature. Accordingly I find no merit in this challenge in the impugned order dated 03.07.2024. In view of the above, this Criminal Miscellaneous Application stands dismissed. JUDGE Tufail
